RayBeamRendererPath: NodePath to the RayBeamRenderer used for film segment generation.
FilmViewPath: Optional TextureRect used to display the film texture.
FilmOverlayPath: Optional FilmOverlay2D for debug ray overlay.
Width: Base film width in pixels before scaling.
Height: Base film height in pixels before scaling.
PixelStride: Traces every Nth pixel and fills stride-sized blocks.
UpdateEveryFrame: Runs RenderStep every frame when enabled.
VerbosePerfLogs: Prints verbose perf logs per band.
NeedColliderNames: Fetches collider names for debug output.
UseFieldSourceCache: Caches field source snapshots for faster updates.
FieldSourceRefreshIntervalFrames: How often to refresh cached field sources.
RowsPerFrame: Number of film rows rendered per frame.
MaxDistance: Max ray distance when auto-range is disabled.
FilmOpacity: Opacity applied to the film TextureRect.
UseCameraPropsBetaGamma: Reads Beta/Gamma from the active Camera3D.
TinySegmentSkipLen: Skips collision checks for tiny segments.
UseAdaptiveSubsteps: Refines collision checks by subdividing segments.
BandSkipHitThreshold: Hit rate threshold to enable skipping.
BandSkipInvalidatePosDelta: Position delta that invalidates band skip history.
BandSkipInvalidateBasisDelta: Basis delta that invalidates band skip history.
BandSkipInvalidateRangeDelta: Range delta that invalidates band skip history.
AutoRangeDepth: Auto-adjusts depth range based on recent hits.
AutoRangeSafety: Safety multiplier for robust far estimate.
DepthHistoryFrames: Frames tracked for robust far estimate.
UseBroadphaseQuickRay: Enables a quick raycast broadphase test.
UseBroadphaseOverlap: Enables a sphere overlap broadphase test.
UsePass2CollisionStride:
Skips some pass-2 collision checks based on distance.

Stride/skips Pass-2 segment tests to save time.
If you see missing strips/holes (especially near high curvature), lower stride (Near/Far), raise MinSegLenForStrideSkip, or disable this.
Pass2CollisionStrideNear:
Stride near the camera for pass-2 collision checks.

Stride used near the camera or early along the ray (higher accuracy).
If you see near-field artifacts, reduce toward 1.
Pass2CollisionStrideFar:
Stride at far distances for pass-2 collision checks.

Stride used farther along the ray (more aggressive skipping).
If far objects disappear or become 'stripy', reduce this.
Pass2CollisionStrideFarStartT:
Start t (0..1) where far stride begins in pass 2.

Where along the segment (0..1) we transition from Near stride to Far stride.
Raise to keep near-accuracy longer; lower to speed up sooner.
MinSegLenForStrideSkip:
If >0, segments shorter than this length always run pass-2 collision tests.

Only segments longer than this are allowed to be stride-skipped.
If small/near geometry gets 'sliced', increase this (more conservative). If perf is bad and artifacts are minimal, decrease.
Pass2HitBackFaces:
Ray query option: include back-facing triangles in pass-2 checks.

Allow back-face hits in Pass-2.
Turn ON if extreme curvature makes rays approach geometry from behind and you want those hits. Turn OFF to avoid 'seeing through' thin meshes.
Pass2HitFromInside:
Ray query option: detect hits when starting inside colliders.

Allow hits when the ray starts inside a collider.
Turn ON if you move the camera/field inside volumes; OFF if you want strict exterior-only intersections.
BroadphasePolicy: Broadphase policy when UseBroadphasePolicy is true.
UseSingleProbeThenSubdivide: Uses a quick probe, then subdivides if needed.
NearestHitOnly: If true, keeps scanning segments for the nearest hit.
ShadingMode: Film shading mode (depth, normal RGB, NdotV).
FlipNormalToCamera: Flips hit normals to face the camera for shading.
DebugEveryNPixels: Debug ray sampling density for overlay.
DebugMaxFilmRays: Cap on debug rays per band.
